story.iWant: to drag and drop files into the message input area and reorder threads in the sidebar
story.soThat: I can quickly attach files to messages and organize my threads without clicking through menus.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: **AC-4.1**: Message input area accepts drag-drop files with visual feedback (drop zone highlight, file count indicator)
**AC-4.2**: Multi-file drag-drop supported with file type and size validation
**AC-4.3**: Thread sidebar supports drag-to-reorder threads with drag handles
**AC-4.4**: Drop rejection states show clear error messages (e.g., "File type not allowed", "File exceeds 100MB limit")
**AC-4.5**: File drop quota validation prevents exceeding storage limits

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes
